admin.publicAccess: Published reports are visible to public users.
admin.adminAccess: Upload, edit, delete, publish and archive actions require future admin login.

autoReports.summary: Open, in-progress and resolved complaints with category-wise and resolution-time analysis.

autoReports.summary: Attendance, role-wise activity, shift coverage and salary/payment status reports.

autoReports.summary: Water, borewell, submersible, electricity, street light and sewage status reports.

autoReports.name: RWA Reports
autoReports.summary: Membership, AGM participation, meeting attendance and committee reporting.

autoReports.name: Uploaded Documents
autoReports.summary: Published uploaded PDFs, Excel sheets, CSV files, Word documents, images and JSON records.
